items.title: macOS 27 Golden Gate will let you resize the iPhone Mirroring window
items.summary: Among the new features in macOS 27 Golden Gate is the ability to resize the iPhone Mirroring window using additional aspect ratios. Here are the details.

items.title: watchOS 27 brings Siri AI, smarter Workout Buddy and a lot more to the Apple Watch
items.summary: From Siri AI to smarter Workout Buddy, here's what watchOS 27 will bring to the Apple Watch this fall. (via Cult of Mac - Your source for the latest Apple news, rumors, analysis, reviews, how-tos and deals. )

items.title: Everything Apple Announced at WWDC 2026 in 10 Minutes
items.summary: Apple held its WWDC 2026 keynote today, introducing iOS 27 , macOs 27, iPadOS 27, watchOS 27, visionOS 27, and tvOS 27. It took Apple an hour and a half to walk through the major new features in the updates, but we have a quicker 10 minute...

items.title: watchOS 27 Features Dynamic App Grid, New Gesture Control, and
items.summary: Apple today unveiled watchOS 27, featuring a redesigned dynamic app grid, new gesture controls, and a raft of usability and battery improvements. The new dynamic app grid surfaces and rearranges five apps based on context and usage. Users...

items.title: Apple Photos Finally Gets a Slideshow Maker
items.summary: Apple today announced new slideshow features coming to the Photos app, allowing users to play any set of photos and videos as a slideshow. There are options to set the slide duration, transition style, and music. iOS 27 also lets users...

items.title: Apple's WWDC AI demos looked more real after $250M false ad settlement
items.summary: The vibe of Apple's 2026 WWDC keynote felt like a spouse proudly listing all the honey-do-list items tackled. One subtle example: the many AI demos of someone standing, phone in hand.

items.title: OpenAI files confidentially for IPO, following Anthropic
items.summary: The filing comes a little more than a week after its main rival, Anthropic, also filed to go public, ramping up the race between the two AI firms.

items.title: Apple demonstrates cross-platform Siri upgrades in macOS 27 Golden Gate at WWDC - update brings Liquid Glass improvements and unifies AI strategy
items.summary: At WWDC, Apple revealed its upcoming macOS update, macOS 27 Golden Gate, with a more refined Liquid Glass design and cross-platform Siri and Apple Intelligence features.

items.title: Synopsys and Samsung Foundry Extend AI-Driven Design Collaboration for Advanced 2nm and Multi-Die Systems
items.summary: At SAFE Forum 2026 , Synopsys announced significant advancements in its collaboration with Samsung Foundry, expanding AI-powered design, verification, test, and IP solutions for Samsung's most advanced process technologies. The...
